channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18966] Missing spin lock in poolset destroy
item.description:
Could be the cause of kernel crashes during shutdown in functions 

kiblnd_fini_fmr_poolset(struct kib_fmr_poolset *fps)

kiblnd_fini_poolset(struct kib_fmr_poolset *fps)
item.summary: Missing spin lock in poolset destroy

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/59059/
Subject: LU-18966 o2iblnd: Missing spin lock in poolset destroy
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 44f01c9b7e932efe6b46bd910eb070546fa00d14

Here is a crash of an older version. This part of the code is the only one that I found that not protected and might cause problems if called from multiple threads.

crash> bt -F
PID: 76143    TASK: ff48648108342300  CPU: 40   COMMAND: "rmmod"
 #0 [ff8297056afe7a00] machine_kexec at ffffffff8dc7a897
    ff8297056afe7a08: 0000000000000000 0000000000000000 
    ff8297056afe7a18: 0000000023003000 ff48648023003000 
    ff8297056afe7a28: 0000000023002000 0000000000000000 
    ff8297056afe7a38: da4d2a2ef0f12600 [kmalloc-128]    
    ff8297056afe7a48: ff8297056afe7a60 __export_symbol_llcrypt_inherit_context+49125 
    ff8297056afe7a58: __crash_kexec+106 
 #1 [ff8297056afe7a58] __crash_kexec at ffffffff8ddfaeba
    ff8297056afe7a60: 0000000000000002 dead000000000100 
    ff8297056afe7a70: dead000000000122 __export_symbol_llcrypt_inherit_context+49125 
    ff8297056afe7a80: ff8297056afe7b90 [kmalloc-128]    
    ff8297056afe7a90: _printk_rb_static_descs+53496 ff8297056afe7848 
    ff8297056afe7aa0: ff8297056afe7870 0000000000000000 
    ff8297056afe7ab0: 0000000000000000 0000000000000000 
    ff8297056afe7ac0: 0000000000000001 0000000000000000 
    ff8297056afe7ad0: 0000000000000000 ff8297056afe7b90 
    ff8297056afe7ae0: __crash_kexec+269 0000000000000010

crash>

"Frank Sehr <fsehr@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/59059
Subject: LU-18966 o2iblnd: Missing spin lock in poolset destroy
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: d148a48dd2dd22a948bfd28cbe4b86130dcc0a39
